alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Maximum levels (MLs) must be legally permitted concentrations. Codex establishes maximum levels (MLs) for contaminants, which are the maximum concentrations legally permitted in a commodity to protect human health. These levels are kept as low as possible based on scientific evidence.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. These criteria define the acceptability of a product or a batch of food placed on the market.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Process hygiene criteria
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. These criteria indicate the correct functioning of the production process.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements, including allergen declaration and warnings
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling requirements for prepackaged food stuffs, including mandatory information, allergen declarations, and warnings, must be verified by consulting the full text of GSO 9:2022.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific mandatory expiration date requirements for food products must be verified by consulting the full text of GSO 150-1:2013.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological criteria
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiological limits for various foodstuffs and food ingredients must be verified by consulting the full text of GSO 1016:2015.

alerts.title: Added: India Allergen List - Mandatory allergen declaration
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Middle East Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life periods for food products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Mandatory shelf life periods for food products must be verified by consulting the full regulation GSO 150-1:2013.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be assessed for safety by SFA and permitted for use. All food businesses offering food for sale in Singapore must comply.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from import or sale. An application can be submitted to SFA to evaluate the use of an additive not currently permitted.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (incidental constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits. All food businesses must comply with these limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from import or sale. Applies if laboratory test results indicate contaminants exceed specified limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Veterinary drug residues (diethylstibestrol, hexoestrol, dienoestrol)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited. Prohibition under Regulation 33 of the Food Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in the list of ingredients on food labels. Applies to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish, sulphite
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Food allergen labeling is required if these allergens are present as an ingredient or food additive. For sulphite, the limit applies as residue sulphur dioxide.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited Foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from production, import, or sale. Verification required for specific list of prohibited foods.. Certain foods are legally prohibited from being on the market.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use in food, as listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30). These substances are labeled as 'DELISTED'.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Food additives and color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Parts 172, 173, 73, 74) or evaluated by FEMA/JECFA for flavoring substances. The Substances Added to Food inventory provides a partial list; full compliance requires checking the referenced CFR parts.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Generally Recognized as Safe (GRAS) substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Parts 182 and 184). The Substances Added to Food inventory provides a partial list; full compliance requires checking the referenced CFR parts.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prior-sanctioned substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be approved for specific uses in foods prior to September 6, 1958, as per 21 CFR Part 181. These substances are approved for specific uses under 21 CFR Part 181.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use in food, as listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189). These substances are labeled as 'PROHIBITED' or 'PROHIBITED WITH EXCEPTIONS'.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The nine major food allergens are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an action level. Specific action levels also exist for Brazil nuts, peanuts and peanut products, and pistachio nuts.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Poisonous or deleterious substances (e.g., toxic elements, mycotoxins, persistent pesticides, radionuclides, other chemical contaminants)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required against the Chemical Contaminants Transparency Tool and referenced guidance documents/regulations (21 CFR parts 109 and 509). The tool provides a consolidated list of tolerances, action levels, guidance levels, derived intervention levels, recommended maximum levels, and advisory levels. Users must refer to linked guidance documents for detailed application.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - 'Gluten-free' claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet defined standard for gluten content. The FDA issued a final rule defining 'gluten-free' for food labeling and established compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the claim.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls and accurate labeling
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Facilities must put written procedures in place to control allergen cross-contact and ensure accurate allergen labeling, as per the CGMP & PC rule (21 CFR part 117).

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Required as they are identified as allergenic substances.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. The food source of a major food allergen must appear in parentheses following the ingredient name OR immediately after or next to the list of ingredients in a 'contains' statement. Specific types of tree nuts, fish species, and Crustacean shellfish species must be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: ≥10. Required due to adverse reactions (e.g., asthma) in sensitive individuals.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Identification of FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: N/A. Required due to potential hypersensitivity reactions in some individuals.

alerts.title: Removed: Bangladesh Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: China Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. The Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA, Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions for permitted food additive use. Users must consult the GSFA Online Database and its Preamble for specific provisions.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via GSFA Online Database. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and Toxins
alerts.details: New: Verification required via General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). The Codex Committee on Contaminants in Food (CCCF) establishes and endorses permitted maximum levels or guideline levels for contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants, detailed in CXS 193-1995.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins
alerts.details: New: Prevention and reduction measures required. A specific Code of Practice (CXC 78-2017) provides guidance for the prevention and reduction of mycotoxins in spices.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants and naturally occurring toxicants (e.g., mycotoxins, metals like arsenic, lead, mercury)
alerts.details: Old: Verification required via Codex maximum levels (MLs) or guideline levels. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union (specifically Sweden, Finland, Norway, and other countries seeking equivalence) Microbiology Limits - Salmonella control special guarantees
alerts.country: European Union (specifically Sweden, Finland, Norway, and other countries seeking equivalence)
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Special guarantees for Salmonella control apply to trade from Sweden, Finland, and Norway. Other EU countries can obtain equivalent guarantees by demonstrating equivalent control programmes.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. The database informs about approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against Union list in Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Laboratory competence for Listeria monocytogenes shelf-life studies
alerts.details: New: Competence evaluation required. This document aims to harmonise the evaluation of laboratory competence for shelf-life studies (challenge tests and durability studies) related to Listeria monocytogenes in RTE foods, ensuring compliance with Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes sampling in processing areas
alerts.details: New: Sampling procedures required. These guidelines describe sampling procedures for food business operators to detect L. monocytogenes on surfaces of RTE food processing areas and equipment.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.details: Old: Must comply with food safety criteria as laid down in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes
alerts.details: Old: Shelf-life studies (durability studies and challenge tests) must comply with food safety criteria defined in Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Production process hygiene
alerts.details: Old: Must comply with process hygiene criteria as laid down in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Salmonella prevalence
alerts.details: Old: Verification required against specific regulations for special guarantees (e.g., Council Decision 95/410/EC, Decision 2004/235/EC, Decision 2003/644/EC, Regulation (EC) No 1688/2005, Regulation (EC) No 853/2004, Regulation (EC) No 2160/2003). Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC/GSO Microbiology Limits - Optional shelf life periods

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Voluntary expiration dates
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Guidelines for voluntary expiration dates for food products must be verified by consulting the full text of GSO 150-2:2013.

alerts.title: Removed: GCC Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.details: New: Verification required as per FSSAI Food Additives Regulations.

alerts.title: Added: India Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per FSSAI Labelling and Display Regulations.

alerts.title: Removed: India Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Additive Limits - All additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific additive limits for seasoning and snack products (under processed foods) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Allergen List - Allergen declaration
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific allergen declaration requirements and lists for seasoning and snack products (under processed foods) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Contaminant Limits - All contaminants
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific contaminant limits for seasoning and snack products (under processed foods) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Food Categories
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Food categories, which influence specific regulatory requirements, must be verified as per PERKABPOM Nomor 34 Tahun 2019.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - General labelling and warnings
alerts.details: New: Verification required. General labelling requirements and warnings for seasoning and snack products (under processed foods) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations.

alerts.title: Removed: Indonesia Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Microbiology Limits - All microbiological parameters
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiology limits for seasoning and snack products (under processed foods) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations.

alerts.title: Added: Indonesia Salt / Sodium Limits - Salt/Sodium content
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific salt/sodium limits for seasoning and snack products (under processed foods) must be verified in the relevant BPOM regulations.

alerts.title: Removed: Iran Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Additive Limits - Not specified
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for specific additive limits and permitted uses in seasonings, snack foods, and processed foods.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - Not specified
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for specific maximum residue limits (MRLs) of agricultural chemicals in food products.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Not specified
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for specific labelling requirements, including nutrition labeling, health claims, and requirements for food for special dietary uses.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Labelling Requirement - Not specified
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification required for specific standards and specifications for food, food additives, and other related aspects, which may include microbiological, contaminant, and compositional limits for seasonings, snack foods, and processed foods.

alerts.title: Removed: Japan Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.details: Old: Manual review required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Middle East Labelling Requirement - Data label requirements for packaged products
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Requirements for data labels of packaged products must be verified by consulting the full standard GSO OIML R79:2021.

alerts.title: Added: Middle East Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.details: New: Verification required. General requirements for Halal food must be verified by consulting the full regulation GSO 2055-1:2015.

alerts.title: Added: Middle East Labelling Requirement - Labelling requirements for pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling requirements for pre-packaged foodstuffs must be verified by consulting the full regulation GSO 9:2022.

alerts.title: Added: Middle East Labelling Requirement - Quantity of product in pre-packaged containers
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Requirements for the quantity of product in pre-packaged containers must be verified by consulting the full standard GSO OIML R87:2021.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Combined Class II chemical preservatives (e.g., sorbic acid, benzoic acid)
alerts.details: New: Calculation required using SFA's Calculation Tool for Class II Chemical Preservatives to determine permitted levels. Applies when two or more Class II chemical preservatives are used in the food.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.details: New: Verification required against SFA's List of Permitted Food Additives or Food Additives Search tool. Businesses must ensure additives are on the permitted list before importing or selling.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Specific food additive limits
alerts.details: New: Verification required against SFA's Guidance Information on Requirements for Use of Food Additives and corresponding regulations. Specific limits vary depending on the additive and the type of food product.

alerts.title: Removed: Singapore Additive Limits - Additive limits verification
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.
